page.title: Category:Articles missing birth or death information

revision.comment: [[User:Addbot|Bot:]] Migrating 2 interwiki links, now provided by [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] on [[d:q8267102]]
1 revision imported: importing a single revision for context
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (16 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
revision.text:
{{Wikipedia category}}
This category lists biographical articles which are missing '''birth or death information''', subcategorized by the specific information which is missing.
{{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:Missing encyclopedic articles (biography)]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles with missing information]] }} [[Category:Categories with 16 members]]
[[en:Category:Articles missing birth or death information]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Wikipedia category}} This category lists biographical articles which are missing '''birth or death information''', subcategorized by the specific information which is missing. {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:Missing encyclopedic articles (biography)]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles with missing information]] }} [[Category:Categories with 16 members]] [[en:Category:Articles missing birth or death information]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
revision.text: {{Wikipedia category}} This category lists biographical articles which are missing '''birth or death information''', subcategorized by the specific information which is missing. {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:Missing encyclopedic articles (biography)]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles with missing information]] }} [[Category:Categories with 16 members]] [[en:Category:Articles missing birth or death information]] [[en:Category:Articles missing birth or death information]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8267102)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Wikipedia category}} This category lists biographical articles which are missing '''birth or death information''', subcategorized by the specific information which is missing.
==Categories==
[[en:Category:Articles missing birth or death information]] {{wikidata link|Q8267102}} [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Missing encyclopedic articles (biography)]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles with missing information]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
